candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above financial items, but it is not labeled as being in Cost of Sales / COGS and could be a company-wide operating D&A total rather than a COGS-specific amount.
Looks like a component beneath the broader 'Depreciation and amortization' line, so it would be inferior to the summary row and is not clearly tied to COGS.
Looks like a more granular component beneath the broader D&A disclosure and is not clearly identified as COGS-related.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Sales'. The excerpt shows a separate operating row 'Depreciation and amortization', but there is no wording such as 'in COGS', 'cost of sales depreciation', or similar to show it should be added specifically to the COGS bucket. To avoid misallocation and double counting, no COGS_DA row is selected.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above financial items, but it is not labeled as SG&A/admin/overhead-specific and may include production-related depreciation as well.
Appears to be a component under the broader D&A disclosure, so the summary row would be preferred if any D&A were selected; still not clearly attributable to SG&A.
More granular depreciation component, not clearly SG&A-related and likely subordinate to the broader D&A line.

variables.notes: Manually Added. Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket consists of employee benefits, share-based payment, other operating expenses, other operating expenses - rest, and research and development expense. The statement presents 'Depreciation and amortization' as a separate operating line at the same level, but it is not clearly identified as SG&A-only, and the visible separate R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so no R&D-specific D&A should be added. Because the D&A line is unallocated between production and overhead, no XSGA_DA row is selected.
